name: Pecan-Lemon Shortbread Hearts
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Unsalted butter, chilled - cut into 1/2 inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Williams Sonoma Cookies and Biscotti p. 24
In a food processor, combine the flour, sugar, cornstarch, lemon zest and salt. Process briefly until well mixed. Add the butter and vanilla, and using rapid pulses, cut in until the mixture resembles a fine meal. Add the pecans and process until finely chopped.
Transfer the mixture to a large sheet of waxed paper and gather together into a flat disk. Place a second sheet of waxed paper on top. Roll out the dough 1/4 inch thick. Using a 3-inch or smaller heart-shaped cutter, cut out cookies. Transfer them to ungreased cookie sheets, spacing them 1/2 inch apart. Gather up the scraps and repeat. Sprinkle the cookies with vanilla sugar if desired.
Bake until just beginning to color, about 20 minutes. Transfer to wire racks and let cool for 5 minutes. Store in an airtight container for up to 1 week.
